plugin.name: Data Cross Joiner
plugin.description: Compare two Excel datasets, export matches and deltas, and open the generated result files.
title: Data Cross Joiner
description: Load two workbooks, choose the match columns, and export joined rows plus dataset deltas.
summary.ready: Choose two workbooks and their match columns.
summary.placeholder: Cross join summary will appear here.
error.missing_input.title: Missing Input
error.missing_inputs: Choose both workbooks and both match columns.
error.columns_missing: Columns '{col_a}' or '{col_b}' were not found in the selected workbooks.
log.done: Cross join complete with {count} output files.
